# ssid

**Instance Property**

The Service Set Identifier (SSID) of the network, also known as the network name.

## Declaration

```swift
let ssid: WISSID
```

## Getting the network SSID

- **isSSIDBroadcast**: A Boolean value indicating whether the access point broadcasts the SSID.

items.description: A Boolean value indicating whether the access point broadcasts the SSID.
